_comment: Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) email send via MCP. The package @modelcontextprotocol/server-brevo does not exist on npm — provider:add refuses to register this template by default. To enable: (a) point command/args at your own Brevo MCP server (e.g. command: node, args: [/path/to/brevo-mcp.js]) AND remove this disabled flag, or (b) re-run with --accept-disabled if you are intentionally testing the disabled path.
name: brevo
